WorshipSong.title: WorshipSong
WorshipSong.description: Represents a worship song in the setlist with synced lyrics

id.description: Unique computed slug of the song

title.description: The title of the worship song

artist.description: The artist of the worship song

tempo.description: The BPM tempo of the song

audioUrl.description: Firebase Storage download url for the audio file

audioFileName.description: The friendly file name of the audio

isPreloaded.description: Whether the song was seeded by default

text.description: The text of this lyric line
The text of this lyric line

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the song was last updated

LiveSession.title: LiveSession
LiveSession.description: Represents the real-time active lyric/song session synchronization

activeSongId.description: The current active song ID or null

status.description: Current player playback status: playing, paused, or idle

eventTimestamp.description: The exact Date.now() millisecond clock time of the laptop action

playbackPosition.description: The current position in seconds inside the audio track when the event happened

ScheduledWorship.title: ScheduledWorship
ScheduledWorship.description: Represents a scheduled worship event that clients can align with via temporal offset matching

id.description: The unique document ID of the scheduled worship

title.description: The name or title of the worship session

description.description: Brief description of the worship context

songId.description: Reference to the song selection tag

startTime.description: The exact millisecond epoch clock timestamp when this session begins

hostId.description: Identifies the browser/host that created the worship to permit deletion

worship_songs/{songId}.description: Collection of worship songs synced across users

system/live_session.description: The singleton live session broadcast info

scheduled_worships/{worshipId}.description: List of scheduled live worship sessions
